rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
rule_metadata.title: Common POST URI Combos used by CobaltStrike during C2 communication

rules.rule_text:
title: Common POST URI Combos used by CobaltStrike during C2 communication
id: b923f7d6-ac89-4a50-a71a-900fb846b4aa
description: Detects common URI combos seen used by CobaltStrike during http POST
  requests for C2 communication
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
date: '2021-10-20'
modified: '2023-08-28'
references:
- None
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection1:
    url|endswith:
    - /s/ref=nb_sb_noss_1/167-3294888-0262949/field-keywords=books
  selection2:
    c-uri:
    - /api/getit
    - /fwlink
    - /g.pixel
    - /dot.gif
    - /updates.rss
    - /__utm.gif
    - /___utm.gif
    - /en_US/all.js
    - /dpixel
    - /ga.js
    - /visit.js
    - /IE9CompatViewList.xml
    - /api/3
    - /api/4
    - /api/y
    - /api/postit
    - /api/getit
    - /mail/u/0/
    - /OWA/
    - /email/
    - /radio/xmlrpc/v35
    - /tab_home_active
    - /N4215/adj/amzn.us.sr.aps
    - /oscp/a/
  selection3:
    c-uri|startswith:
    - /c/msdownload/update/others/
    - /safebrowsing/rd/
  selection4:
    c-uri|startswith:
    - /bootstrap-
    - /jquery-
    c-uri|endswith:
    - .js
  post:
    cs-method: POST
  filter:
    cs-host:
    - mail.google.com
    - mail.google.com.mcas.ms
    - analytics.apps.seabroadnet.com
    - go.microsoft.com
    - outlook.live.com
    - mail-settings.google.com
  condition: 1 of selection* and post and not filter
falsepositives:
- It is expected to see legitimate GET requests towards these URIs, in rare cases
  POST might occur as legitimate traffic.
level: medium
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
